name: Serapeum: Shu of Union
description:
The archives look interesting today... Maybe you could learn something about Langqiu City... Or maybe you just wanna know that cute librarian who owns the whole place...

Part 9 of the Honkai Ball Z series!

Step into the Tombstone Library, where the halls are lined with books of all kinds. You can simply take your time and browse the shelves... Or if you wish, you can strike up conversation with her...
creator: Comanche99
